title: Modernize streamy: remove unused broadcasts, direct_messages, utils, and dead code
description: Remove all unused modules and dead code from the streamy package. Specifically: (1) Delete entire lib/broadcasts/ directory (3 files) — Streamy.broadcast() and BroadCasts.allow() never called. (2) Delete entire lib/direct_messages/ directory (3 files) — Streamy.sessions()/sessionsForUsers() never called, apps use Streamy.sockets()+emit() directly. (3) Remove userId() and user() from utils_client.js and utils_server.js — never called, keep only Streamy.id(). (4) Remove reactive-var dependency from package.js — only used by dead userId tracking. (5) Remove Streamy._usersId, Accounts.onLogin hook, logout sniffing hack, and socketsForUsers() from core_server.js. (6) Remove Streamy.close() from core_client.js. (7) Remove Streamy.BroadCasts and Streamy.DirectMessages from namespaces.js. (8) Delete examples/chat/ directory. (9) Clean up hasOwnProperty patterns in connection.js. (10) Update CHANGELOG.md with a v2.1.0 entry documenting the cleanup. (11) Bump version to 2.1.0 in package.js and package.json.
closeReason: Modernized streamy v2.1.0: deleted broadcasts/, direct_messages/, examples/chat/; removed dead code (userId/user utils, _usersId tracking, socketsForUsers, Streamy.close(), Accounts.onLogin hook, logout sniffing); removed reactive-var dep; cleaned hasOwnProperty patterns; bumped version; updated CHANGELOG. Two builders: builder-cleanup (main work) and builder-fixup (missed stubs). Both merge_ready sent.

title: Clean up repo state: delete stale branch, commit seeds/versions, remove AGENTS.md
description: Post-modernization housekeeping: (1) Delete leftover lead branch overstory/lead-streamy-cleanup/streamy-b172. (2) Commit .seeds/issues.jsonl so closed issue streamy-b172 is tracked. (3) Add .versions (Meteor lockfile) to git. (4) Delete AGENTS.md (overstory scaffolding, not package content). (5) Clean up the lead worktree.
closeReason: Post-modernization housekeeping complete: tracked .versions (Meteor lockfile), cleaned .gitignore (removed .versions/AGENTS.md entries, fixed whitespace), updated .seeds/issues.jsonl, deleted stale branch overstory/lead-streamy-cleanup/streamy-b172 and its worktree.
